scenario.name: PhoneBlock Dongle Mock Registrar (Digest)
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 401 Unauthorized [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] WWW-Authenticate: Digest realm="phoneblock.test", nonce="0123456789abcdef", algorithm=MD5, qop="auth" Server: SIPp Mock Registrar (PhoneBlock dongle test-rig) Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag02[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Contact:];expires=300 Server: SIPp Mock Registrar (PhoneBlock dongle test-rig) Content-Length: 0
